ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DILLON, PATRICK THOMAS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNN, CARDEL RICARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DILLON, PATRICK THOMAS $1,021.67 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,081.67, AWARD BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $1638.89, SUBJECT TO REDUCTION BASED ON 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT ATTRIBUTED TO PLAINTIFF AND CREDIT FOR PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF. THIS JUDGMENT SHALL BE REDUCED TO THE EXTENT OF ANY AMOUNTS PAID TO PLAINTIFF BY THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN DUNN V. MEDINA (NO.816300) AND ANY AMOUNTS PAID TO PLAINTIFF BY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN THIS CASE SHALL REDUCE THE JUDGMENT IN DUNN V. MEDINA SO THAT PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL RECOVERY FROM BOTH JUDGMENTS DOES NOT EXCEED
COPYING FEES
